title: AI-generated content is flooding search results, social feeds, and low-quality websites
first_visible_signal: Recent public reporting and research show AI-generated summaries, AI slop, synthetic-content recursion, and generative search are affecting search, social feeds, software workflows, liability risk, and source quality.

public_sources_available_at_cutoff.title: Reuters: Google to appeal German ruling on liability for AI Overviews false claims
public_sources_available_at_cutoff.why_it_matters: Shows AI-generated search summaries have live legal/liability consequences.

public_sources_available_at_cutoff.title: WIRED: Fake podcasts and AI-generated content used for search-engine manipulation
public_sources_available_at_cutoff.why_it_matters: Shows scalable synthetic content being used to manipulate search/discovery systems.

public_sources_available_at_cutoff.title: arXiv: How Generative AI Disrupts Search
public_sources_available_at_cutoff.why_it_matters: Empirical study of how AI Overviews/generative search change sources, rankings, and consistency.

public_sources_available_at_cutoff.title: arXiv: How Bad is Training on Synthetic Data?
public_sources_available_at_cutoff.why_it_matters: Supports AI recursion/model-collapse concern when synthetic data replaces real data.

public_sources_available_at_cutoff.title: arXiv: Data Voids and Warning Banners on Google Search
public_sources_available_at_cutoff.why_it_matters: Supports the search-quality/data-void part of the signal.

bounded_action: For the next 60 days, treat AI/web-quality claims as real but not catastrophic: prefer primary sources, record source dates, avoid relying on unsourced AI summaries, and watch for legal, search-ranking, publisher-traffic, and platform-policy evidence.
one_thing_not_to_do: Do not convert this into a total 'the web is dead' conclusion or assume every AI-mediated result is corrupted.

what_would_change_label.toward_act: Reliable evidence that search quality, publisher economics, legal liability, or workplace productivity is materially worsening and requires immediate policy/process change.
what_would_change_label.toward_watch: Evidence that platforms are successfully filtering AI slop, protecting source diversity, and maintaining reliable search quality.
what_would_change_label.toward_pause: Signal becomes mostly emotional/conspiratorial with weak sources and no concrete action.

expected_review_question: By the review date, did new evidence show measurable degradation in search/source quality, increased legal/platform response, or expanded synthetic-content manipulation beyond normal spam/noise?
review_notes: Frozen prospective signal registered from public sources available at cutoff. Future-dependent cascade fields intentionally left unknown.
